---
title: "Growth Anal"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

combined_df <- read_excel("C:/Users/brody/Desktop/Brody Thesis Project/Data Sets/combined_coral_benthic_fish.xlsx")
```

```{r}
combined_df1 <- combined_df %>%
  filter(!Year %in% c(2018, 2024)) |> 
   mutate(
    Year = factor(Year),
    Treatment = factor(Treatment),
    Block = factor(Block)
  )
```

```{r}
combined_df1 <- combined_df1 %>%
  mutate(
    Treatment = factor(
      Treatment,
      levels = c("Con", "1x1", "2x2", "TopOnly")
    )
  )
```


```{r}
combined_df2 <- combined_df1 %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(CCA_calcareous, Fleshy_MA, `Lobo/Peys`,
      Scleractinian, SPAT, TAS,
      Grazerdetritivore, Herbivore_Sc_Br),
    scale
  ))
```

###############################################################################################################################

## Treatment and Year


```{r}
library(lme4)

m1 <- lmer(
  mean_indiv_growth_cm2 ~ Treatment + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  REML = FALSE
)

m2 <- lmer(
  mean_indiv_growth_cm2 ~ Year + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  REML = FALSE
)

m3 <- lmer(
  mean_indiv_growth_cm2 ~ Treatment + Year + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  REML = FALSE
)

m4 <- lmer(
  mean_indiv_growth_cm2 ~ Treatment * Year + (1 | Block),
  data = combined_df2,
  REML = FALSE
)

anova(m1, m2, m3, m4)
```




###############################################################################################################################





## Coral Growth using gaussian mixed model (simplest), maybe switch to gamma if residuals dont fit 

```{r}
full_growth <- lmer(
  mean_indiv_growth_cm2 ~ Treatment +
  Year +
  CCA_calcareous +
  Fleshy_MA +
  `Lobo/Peys` +
  #Scleractinian +
  SPAT +
  TAS +
  Grazerdetritivore +
  Herbivore_Sc_Br +
  (1|Block),
  data = combined_df2
)
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(MuMIn)

options(na.action = "na.fail")

dredge(full_growth, fixed = "Year")
```








```{r}
growth_preds <- c(
  "Treatment",
  "Year",
  "CCA_calcareous",
  "Fleshy_MA",
  "Scleractinian",
  "Herbivore_Sc_Br"
)

growth_mod <- lmer(
  mean_indiv_growth_cm2 ~ Treatment +
  Year +
  CCA_calcareous +
  #Fleshy_MA +
  `Lobo/Peys` +
  #Scleractinian +
  SPAT +
  TAS +
  #Grazerdetritivore +
  #Herbivore_Sc_Br +
  (1|Block),
  data = combined_df2
)
```

```{r}
formula(growth_mod)
summary(growth_mod)
broom.mixed::tidy(growth_mod, effects = "fixed")
MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(growth_mod)
AIC(growth_mod)
BIC(growth_mod)
logLik(growth_mod)
performance::check_singularity(growth_mod)
performance::check_normality(growth_mod)
performance::check_heteroscedasticity(growth_mod)
```


```{r}
growth_model <- lmerTest::lmer(
  mean_indiv_growth_cm2 ~
    Treatment +
    Year +
    CCA_calcareous +
    #Fleshy_MA +
    `Lobo/Peys` +
    #Scleractinian +
    SPAT +
    TAS +
    #Grazerdetritivore +
    #Herbivore_Sc_Br +
    (1|Block),
  data = combined_df2
)

fixed_effects <- broom.mixed::tidy(growth_model, effects = "fixed")
r2 <- MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(growth_model)
aic_val <- AIC(growth_model)
#collinearity <- performance::check_collinearity(growth_model)
#normality <- performance::check_normality(growth_model)
#heteroscedasticity <- performance::check_heteroscedasticity(growth_model)

fixed_effects
r2
aic_val
#collinearity
#normality
#heteroscedasticity
```
```{r}
anova(growth_model)
```
